notableEvents.label: Luis Arraez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis Arraez grounds into a double play, second baseman Javier Sanoja to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Liam Hicks. Drew Gilbert out at 2nd. Luis Arraez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Connor Norby GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Connor Norby grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Jakob Marsee out at 2nd. Connor Norby out at 1st.
